title: knautia drymeja subsp. nympharum
intro: Knautia drymeja subsp. nympharum, also known as Field Scabious or Nymph's Fritillary, is a flowering plant species within the honeysuckle family, valued for its medicinal and herbal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Knautia drymeja subsp. nympharum include its ability to soothe inflammation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant was prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in the form of a syrup or topical application for skin issues.
